project.name: Skydale Residency
project.description: Skydale Residency is a completed residential project in Samartha Nagar, Nashik.

relatedProjects.name: Shriniwas Niketan
relatedProjects.tagline: Best Ideal Home Project in the Heart of Nashik
relatedProjects.description: Shriniwas Niketan is located in Mahatma Nagar, one of the premium suburbs of Nashik, offering the best of the city right at your doorstep. This location combines the vibrant energy of city living with the peaceful serenity of a quiet retreat. Shriniwas Niketan offers a collection of luxurious 3 BHK flats, designed for modern families, with each flat offering spacious and well-ventilated living spaces.

relatedProjects.name: Fireflies
relatedProjects.tagline: A hillside residential retreat in Bhavali Hills
relatedProjects.description: Fireflies is an ongoing residential project set in the hills of Bhavali, Igatpuri — designed for a nature-first lifestyle away from the city.
